evals.prompt: Pull the most common adverse reactions reported for metformin from the FDA adverse event reports, and tell me how many of them were serious.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-fda: uses the openFDA drug/event endpoint via FDAQuery (query_drug_events plus count_by_field on patient.reaction.reactionmeddrapt) and counts serious:1 events for metformin, returning ranked reactions and a serious-event total.

assertions.value: Queries the openFDA drug adverse-event (FAERS) endpoint and aggregates reaction terms for the named drug rather than searching the web.

evals.prompt: Find the 510(k) clearances submitted by Medtronic in the FDA device database, and also check whether any of their pacemakers have recent adverse event reports.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-fda: uses query_device_510k(applicant="Medtronic") on the openFDA device 510(k) endpoint and query_device_events for pacemaker adverse events, combining device clearance and surveillance data.

evals.prompt: Search the FDA enforcement reports for Class I food recalls due to undeclared peanut so I can build an allergen-recall timeline.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-fda: uses query_food_recalls(reason="undeclared peanut", classification="I") against the openFDA food enforcement endpoint and returns the matching Class I recall records.

evals.prompt: I have the UNII code R16CO5Y76E. Look it up in the FDA substance database and give me the substance name and CAS number.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-fda: uses query_substance_by_unii("R16CO5Y76E") against the openFDA other/substance endpoint to return the UNII-to-name and CAS mapping with chemical structure info.

evals.prompt: Compare the adverse-event and serious-event rates of three NSAIDs (ibuprofen, naproxen, celecoxib) using FDA data so I can flag the riskiest one.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-fda: iterates the openFDA drug/event endpoint per drug to get total and serious counts, computes a serious-rate per drug (the compare_drugs pattern), and ranks them.

assertions.value: Builds a side-by-side adverse-event comparison across the named drugs using openFDA counts.

evals.prompt: What is metformin's mechanism of action, its drug targets, and known drug-drug interactions at the pharmacology level?
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-drugbank. The user wants curated pharmacology (mechanism, targets, interactions), not FDA regulatory/safety surveillance data like adverse events or recalls.

evals.prompt: Find all currently recruiting Phase 3 clinical trials testing pembrolizumab in non-small-cell lung cancer.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-clinicaltrials. The user wants trial registry records (recruitment status, phase, eligibility), not FDA post-market safety, labeling, or approval data.
